uplink.description: Measurements (opcode 3): temperature, humidity, pressure, light, CO2, TVOC
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (Mutelcor LoRaButton decoder) and normalizing per AUTHORING.md. Voltage 3.05 V; temp raw 0x00D5=213 ->/10=21.3; rh 47; press 0x2794=10132 ->/10=1013.2; light 0x01C2=450; CO2 0x032C=812; TVOC 0x0096=150 ppb.

uplink.description: Measurements (opcode 3): negative temperature, humidity, CO2 only
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js. Voltage 0x0122=290 ->/100=2.9 V; temp raw 0xFFCC=65484 -> signed -52 ->/10=-5.2; rh 88; CO2 0x04B0=1200. Exercises two's-complement negative temperature.

uplink.description: Measurements (opcode 3): full air-quality head with particulate matter
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js. Voltage 3.12 V; full bitmask 0xFF + extended byte 0x02 selects PM. temp 18.5; rh 55; press 0x2710=10000 ->/10=1000; light 0x012C=300; CO2 0x0258=600; TVOC 0x0028=40 ppb; distance 0x0384=900 mm; PM1.0=5, PM2.5=12, PM10=18 ug/m3.

uplink.description: Truncated measurements: temperature flagged but bytes missing (decode error)
uplink._note: Synthetic out-of-bounds payload; measurements bitmask sets bit 0 (temperature) but the two temperature bytes are absent. reference/upstream-codec.js reports error code 90.
Synthetic empty payload; reference/upstream-codec.js reports error code 0 (Empty).
